title: gymnadenia conopsea subsp. borealis
intro: Gymnadenia conopsea subsp. borealis, also known as the northern summer green orchid or northern spring orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It is a perennial orchid native to the northern parts of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The roots of Gymnadenia conopsea subsp. borealis can be used to prepare herbal remedies, such as infusions and tinctures, which are believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health.
